category_sources: source_facts.description says Terrascan detects compliance and security violations across Infrastructure as Code; official README calls it a static code analyzer for IaC.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is terrascan; official repository README title and product pages use Terrascan.
docs_sources: Official README points to runterrascan.io as the documentation portal, which currently redirects to Tenable's Terrascan page; official README remains available for usage details.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/tenable/terrascan, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe IaC security and compliance scanning across Terraform, Kubernetes, and other cloud-native infrastructure.
